body.p: Install the addon to extend the functionality of the application.
The server sends a broad-cast message to all connected clients.
Export the data in a comma delimited format for processing.
Define the meta-class to control object creation behavior.
The micro-chip handles all signal processing tasks.
Change the video-mode setting to match your display resolution.
The sales team uses this feature to up-sell premium support plans.
Add a call-out to highlight the important information.
